ogTitle: Barunga Gap vs Baudin Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barunga Gap and Baudin Beach.
heading: Barunga Gap vs Baudin Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barunga Gap, South Australia and Baudin Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barunga Gap has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Baudin Beach (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barunga Gap or Baudin Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barunga Gap has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Baudin Beach scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barunga Gap scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Baudin Beach scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barunga Gap or Baudin Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barunga Gap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
